## Verification

Commands run:

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:examples`

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Framework behavior
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Tooling/CI
